## Summary

Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Validation

List the commands and results used to validate the change.

## Impact

Describe security, AWS cost, Discord, compatibility, and data-retention impact.

## Checklist

- [ ] I used current official sources and recorded the verification date.
- [ ] I added or updated tests for the changed behavior.
- [ ] I did not include credentials, private identifiers, persona configuration, user content, or local absolute paths.
- [ ] I did not edit mirrored design documents unless the maintainer explicitly requested it.
